Managed fully distributed team across multiple time zones with 100% remote collaboration using Notion, Jira, Slack, and structured asynchronous workflows

Infrastructure optimization (CPU/memory tuning eliminating OOM incidents)

Consumer App: 75% → 98%
JOT: 91% → 96%
Verse/SRP: 80% → 85%

Built prompt-evaluator-feedback loops for IRIS (intent accuracy) and L3 adaptive feedback engine for Stardust (sentiment/severity classification via Slack)
